rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of 1052 Fulton Street, San Francisco, Ca 94117 And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Defendants Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 21, 2016 line 2. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ROUPPET's Motion To Compel Inspection Of 1052 Fulton Street, San Francisco, Ca 94117 And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Defendant's Counsel DENIED. Plaintiff has been out of possession of the unit in question for 4 years and the unit is currently occupied by a different tenant. Plaintiff provides no evidence that other, less intrusive means, are insufficient to obtain the necessary information. Request for sanctions is denied.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER R BERG ET AL VS. AINA STUNZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 21, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT AINA STUNZ's Hearing And Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities OFF CALENDAR. For December 6, 2016 hearing the Court issued a tentative ruling (adopted as order of the Court) ordering the parties to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings, including moving papers. No courtesy copy of the moving papers provided to the Court (SFLR 2.7B) as of December 19, 2016.= (501/REQ)
